title: leucanthemum croaticum
intro: Leucanthemum croaticum, also known as Croatian daisy or White Rayed Cudweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Leucanthemum croaticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried for use in capsules and other supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
